Otome no Ōjo | foster_children = | court_titles = | Rank_before_empress = | honors = | positions = | autograph = | notes = }} '''Yasakairibime no Mikoto''' (八坂入媛命, やさかいりびめのみこと, dates of birth and death unknown) was the consort of {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Emperor Keikō|1=Emperor Keikō}}. She is also known in the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|WD=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} as "Yasaka no Iribime no Mikoto" (八尺之入日売命). Her father was {{ill|Yasakairibiko no Mikoto|ja|八坂入彦命|1=Yasaka-Iribiko-no-Mikoto|comment=I know this does not exist but want the link to be standard across the wiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasakairibiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka-Iribiko-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, a son of {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}, while her mother is unknown. She was the mother of seven sons and six daughters, including {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}..{{Cite web|title=Yasakairihime • . A History . . of Japan . 日本歴史|url=https://historyofjapan.co.uk/wiki/yasakairihime/|access-date=2023-11-28|website=. A History . . of Japan . 日本歴史|language=en-GB}}{{cite book|author=Kenneth Henshall|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=tmYYAgAAQBAJ&q=Seimu+84&pg=PA487|title=Historical Dictionary of Japan to 1945|publisher=Scarecrow Press|year=2013|isbn=9780810878723|page=487}}{{cite book|url=https://books.google.com/books?id=uxUUAQAAMAAJ&q=Wakatarashi+hiko|title=Memoirs of the Research Department of the Toyo Bunko (the Oriental Library), Issues 32-34|publisher=[[:en:Toyo Bunko|Toyo Bunko]]|year=1974|pages=63–64|access-date=1 August 2019}} Yasakairibime entered the court of Emperor Keikō on February 21 of the 4th year of his reign. Originally, her younger sister Otome had caught the Emperor's attention, but Otome declined and recommended Yasakairibime, leading to her union with the Emperor. On May 4 of the 52nd year of Keikō's reign, the then-empress, [[Harima no Inabi no Ōiratsume]], passed away. Yasakairibime was elevated to empress on July 7 of the same year. She became Empress Dowager on November 10 of the 2nd year of Emperor Seimu's reign. == Genealogy == * **Father**: {{ill|Yasakairibiko no Mikoto|ja|八坂入彦命|1=Yasaka-Iribiko-no-Mikoto|comment=I know this does not exist but want the link to be standard across the wiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasakairibiko no Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Yasaka-Iribiko-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * **Mother**: Unknown * **Younger Sister**: Otome * **Husband**: {{ill|Emperor Keikō|en|Emperor Keikō|WD=Q329723|lt=Emperor Keikō|1=Emperor Keikō}} ** **Children**: {{ill|Emperor Seimu|en|Emperor Seimu|WD=Q316672|lt=Emperor Seimu|1=Emperor Seimu}} Iokiribiko no Mikoto, Osobewake no Mikoto, Wakayaonekoneko no Mikoto, Ōsubewake no Mikoto, Nunoshihime no Mikoto, Nunashirohime no Mikoto, Iokiriihime no Mikoto, Kainoyorihime no Mikoto, Isasajiiwakohiko no Mikoto, Kibinoanihiko no Mikoto, Takagiihime no Mikoto, and Otohime no Mikoto. {{ill|List of Japanese Empresses|ja|歴代皇后一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese Empresses|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|List of Japanese Empress Dowagers|ja|歴代日本の皇太后一覧|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Japanese Empress Dowagers|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{Japanese-history-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Consorts of Japan}} {{Japan-hist-stub}} {{Imperial-stub}} ==Genealogy== {{Generations of Jimmu}} ==Footnotes== ===Notes=== ===References=== {{Consorts of Japan}} [[Draft:Yasakairi-hime]] {{translated page|ja|八坂入媛命|version=87683736|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q10892048|en|Yasakairi-hime|fa|یاساکاایری هیمه نو میکوتو|ja|八坂入媛命|ko|야사카이리비메노미코토|zh|八坂入姬命|simple|Yasakairi-hime}} [[Category:Ancient Japanese women]] [[Category:Date of birth unknown]] [[Category:Emperor Keikō]] [[Category:Empress Dowagers of Japan]] [[Category:Female Imperial Family Members before the Kofun Period]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Year_of_birth_unknown]] [[Category:Year_of_death_unknown]]
